_comment: USD per 1,000,000 tokens, blended input/output average — purely illustrative. Weighted 3:1 input:output (agentic coding sends far more context/input tokens than it generates output), from published Anthropic API list pricing as of 2026-07. Claude Sonnet 5 uses its introductory rate ($2/$10 per MTok through 2026-08-31, then $3/$15) — revisit after that date. Fill in your own plan/API rates for models you want priced differently; anything left null is treated as "unpriced" and excluded from the cost total (not treated as free).
